history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a stylized game or profile “Level Up” interface screen with a character portrait on the left and level progress information in the center.

Main Subject:
A user interface panel labeled “LEVEL UP!” at the top displays a character icon circle on the left and multiple progress and stats boxes in the center, including “Hutao Assisten 1,” a level value, and experience progress.

Setting:
The scene is entirely digital, resembling a game menu on a dark purple gradient background with a rounded rectangular panel in the middle. The lighting is uniform and UI-like, with bright text and muted dark tones.

Visual Details:
At the very top center, there is gold text reading “LEVEL UP!” flanked by small diamond-like symbols. Below it, a large rounded rectangle panel spans most of the width. Inside the panel, the header line shows “Hutao Assisten 1” in large white text, with a small gold badge to the right that contains “#1.” Under that, the label “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller text. Near the left side is a circular avatar frame with a thick purple border; inside is a stylized anime-like character with light skin, brown hair, and red eyes, wearing a light-colored outfit with darker accents, posed looking toward the viewer with a hand near the face. In the center area, there are two rounded rectangles side-by-side: one darker one with “LEVEL” and a large “11,” and one green-tinted one with “EXPERIENCE” and “14 / 600.” Beneath the experience area is a horizontal progress bar in dark gray with a small bright indicator and a “2%” label to the right. Lower down are three smaller rounded boxes containing stat labels: “MESSAGES 850,” “XP NEEDED 586,” and “NEXT LVL 12.” At the bottom center of the panel, there is faint gray text: “Congratulations on leveling up!” The overall composition is centered, with the avatar aligned to the left of the main information cluster.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Hutao Assisten 1
#1
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
11
EXPERIENCE
14 / 600
2%
MESSAGES
850
XP NEEDED
586
NEXT LVL
12
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
This image is a dark-themed “Level Up” game UI screen showing a character avatar and level progression details. It presents the current level, experience progress toward the next level, and additional stats for messages and XP needed.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
